context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel simulation
context.role: Discomfort state when cage has 3+ poop items
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60, on perch at y=80
context.usage_scenario: Triggered when cage cleanliness threshold exceeded, prompts player to clean cage

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with uncomfortable posture, crest slightly lowered, body hunched
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art with organic hand-drawn feel, no gradients
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on crest, beak, and body silhouette

animation.description: Frame 1: normal uncomfortable pose, Frame 2: slight shift of weight, Frame 3: return to Frame 1

visual_specification.details: Eyes half-closed (1x2px instead of 2x2px), crest lowered by 2px, body appears slightly hunched (compressed vertically by 1-2px), feet positioned closer together, tail feathers drooped, overall posture conveys discomfort without exaggeration

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle (posture and eye state), echo_sleeping (eyes partially visible), echo_happy (opposite emotional state)

explicit_negations: No actual dirt or grime on Echo's body (stays clean)
No refusal to interact with player
No visible stink lines or smell indicators
